nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 格雷羅州
nodes.summary: 格雷羅州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括Eared poorwill、大瑰喉蜂鸟、青绿阔嘴蜂鸟等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 棕煌蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 棕煌蜂鸟（Rufous hummingbird，学名 Selasphorus rufus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于格雷羅州，主要威胁包括气候变化、农药污染。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Most individuals winter in wooded areas in the Mexican state of Guerrero, traveling over by an overland route from their nearest summer home – a prodigious journey for a bird weighing only . Adult male rufous hummingbirds tend to migrate slightly earlier than females or young. Since juveniles and females are essentially indistinguishable from Allen's hummingbird, unless confirmed by close inspection, eastern rufous migrants may be classified as "rufous/Allen's hummingbirds"

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2018, the rufous hummingbird was uplisted from least concern to near threatened on the IUCN Red List, on the basis that due to its reliance on insect prey during the wintering season, it will be heavily affected by the global decline in insect populations due to pesticides and intensified agriculture. Due to climate change, many flowers that the rufous hummingbird feeds on during the breeding season have started blooming two weeks prior to the birds' arrival to their breeding locations, which may lead to rufous hummingbirds arriving too late to feed on them

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2018, the rufous hummingbird was uplisted from least concern to near threatened on the IUCN Red List, on the basis that due to its reliance on insect prey during the wintering season, it will be heavily affected by the global decline in insect populations due to pesticides and intensified agriculture.
